arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho transfer twist as Enzo Maresca responds to Man Utd demands
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho moved to Chelsea on loan with a permanent move on his radar but Enzo Maresca is yet to make a call on his future with Manchester United needing his sale to fund their summer plans

Chelsea player gains 5-6kg of muscle – Wants to put injuries behind him
arts.sum: Last summer, Chelsea signed Aaron Anselmino from Boca Juniors and immediately sent him back on a season-long loan deal. The Premier League club cut short the centre-back’s loan stay and recalled him in January due to injuries to other players. He’s yet to make his debut for the Blues. arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho sends agent 'instruction' as Chelsea discover £50m release clause chance
arts.sum: Both stints have seen Sancho play his best football and the demand from the forward - reportedly - came before Maresca insisted that the player "could do better" at Chelsea. According to BILD, Chelsea loanee Jadon Sancho has insisted to his agent that he wants to move back to former club Borussia Dortmund in the summer.

arts.sum: Manchester City, Liverpool and Chelsea have included Udinese star Oumar Solet in their target list, according to Sportitalia. The defender was released by Red Bull Salzburg at the end of last season and was without a club until Udinese signed him in January. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Tottenham simulated to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: London rivals Chelsea and Tottenham face off in the Premier League later today, with Spurs looking to win at Stamford Bridge for the first time since 2018. Both sides return from the international break refreshed, but there's more on the line in today's clash for Chelsea, with the Blues looking to continue their battle for a Champions League place next season.
